name: realtime-load-auction
description: Корневой раннер скриптов. НЕ pnpm workspace: apps/api и apps/web остаются независимыми (раздельные pnpm-lock.yaml и node_modules).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm -C apps/api start:dev" "pnpm -C apps/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm -C apps/api build && pnpm -C apps/web build
scripts.lint: pnpm -C apps/api lint && pnpm -C apps/web lint
scripts.install:all: pnpm -C apps/api install && pnpm -C apps/web install
